data.title: 国际服炸服（临时维护）9 & 主要内容更新延期通知
data.summary: [11/1(Tue) Temporary Maintenance Notice] We'll be undergoing temporary maintenance on 11/1 (Tue). 🗓️
data.body:
[11/1(Tue) Temporary Maintenance Notice]
We'll be undergoing temporary maintenance on 11/1 (Tue).

🗓️Maintenance Period: 11/1 (Tue) 02:00 ~ 08:00 (UTC)
➡️Details: https://m.nexon.com/forum/thread/101794

*The major content update previously scheduled will take place on 11/8 (Tue).

[Maintenance Notice]

We're currently under our 11/1 (Tue) temporary maintenance.
The game is unavailable while under maintenance.

🗓️Maintenance Period: 11/1 (Tue) 02:00 ~ 08:00 (UTC)
➡️Details: https://m.nexon.com/forum/thread/101794

11/1(Tue) temporary maintenance will be finished on 6:30 AM (UTC).

[Maintenance Notice]
11/1 (Tue) temporary maintenance has ended.

Maintenance Reward: Pyroxene x 720
(Maintenance rewards will be available in your mailbox until 11/8, 14:59 PM (UTC))

#BlueArchive
